---
applyTo: "**/*"
description: Always-on reminder — DETECT->FETCH->IMPLEMENT->CITE for external-knowledge claims
---

# Source Verification

External-knowledge claims require DETECT → FETCH → IMPLEMENT → CITE. Never fabricate URLs, signatures, limits, or standards text. Use the `source-verification` skill for the full workflow and the [detail companion](source-verification-detail.instructions.md) for format and scope.
